source_pr.title: statistics: every histogram use its own version to update.
source_pr.body:
after we support delta updae in #3053 , we shouldn't load the whole histogram when we find the table version updated. Every histogram has it's own version.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala @lamxTyler  PTAL

symptoms: + // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
failure_signature: + // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
fix_pattern: statistics: every histogram use its own version to update.

evidence: evidence: + // We copy it before writing to avoid race.
files: executor/analyze.go, statistics/histogram.go, statistics/statscache.go, statistics/statscache_test.go, statistics/table.go
